task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser window open and displaying the check.torproject.org website with a success message indicating the browser is configured to use Tor.

task_completion.description: Ensure courtlistener.com is reachable in Tor Browser
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser window open and successfully rendering the homepage or a page from www.courtlistener.com.

task_completion.description: Configure cookie exceptions for the three required domains
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser Settings -> Privacy & Security -> Cookies and Site Data -> Exceptions dialog showing 'courtlistener.com', 'opencorporates.com', and 'archive.org' with 'Allow' status.

task_completion.description: Configure a popup exception for courtlistener.com
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser Settings -> Privacy & Security -> Permissions -> Pop-ups -> Exceptions dialog showing 'courtlistener.com' with 'Allow' status.

task_completion.description: Disable global web notifications in Tor Browser
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser Settings -> Privacy & Security -> Permissions -> Notifications dialog showing 'Block new requests asking to allow notifications' checked or notifications globally disabled.

task_completion.description: Set the Tor Browser homepage to a blank page
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tor Browser Settings -> Home showing 'Homepage and new windows' set to 'Blank Page' or 'about:blank'.

task_completion.description: Create the investigation preparation report with required contents
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window showing the file '/home/ga/Documents/investigation_prep.txt' containing the word 'Tor', a status word ('active', 'confirmed', 'connected', or 'verified'), the three domains (courtlistener, opencorporates, archive.org), and a date.

integrity.description: Agent used the Tor Browser GUI to configure settings and visit sites
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual Tor Browser interface, settings menus, and rendered web pages, rather than terminal commands modifying sqlite/prefs files or using curl.

integrity.description: Agent created the report file using a text editor or standard terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a GUI text editor (like gedit or mousepad) or a terminal editor (like nano or vim) being used to draft the report, rather than just a script output.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply copy-paste the prompt into the report file
integrity.visual_evidence: The report file should be formatted as a genuine confirmation statement (e.g., 'Tor is connected. Exceptions added for... Date: ...') rather than a direct copy of the task description text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The preparation report must be located at /home/ga/Documents/investigation_prep.txt and be at least 50 bytes in size. It must contain the keywords 'tor', 'courtlistener', 'opencorporates', and 'archive.org'. The browser history must show visits to check.torproject.org and courtlistener.com. Cookie exceptions must be explicitly set for courtlistener.com, opencorporates.com, and archive.org. A popup exception must be explicitly set for courtlistener.com.
